bosses.name: The Keep Warden
bosses.telegraph: The Warden hefts its cleaver. Below half health its fury doubles - end it fast or guard the rage.
bosses.description: A towering brute that guards the ruined keep.

bosses.name: The Crystal Sorcerer
bosses.telegraph: Frost gathers round the Sorcerer. Each fallen servant feeds its magic - strike the master first.
bosses.description: A mage who weaves ice and venom in the crystal depths.

bosses.name: The Hollow Commander
bosses.telegraph: The Commander signals the pack. Below half health it rallies its fallen once - silence it first.
bosses.description: A cunning leader who fights amid a loyal warband.

bosses.name: The Endless Tyrant
bosses.telegraph: The Tyrant surges forward. Its opening blow lands doubled - guard the first strike, then answer.
bosses.description: A tyrant who throws wave upon wave of minions.

bosses.name: The Deep King
bosses.telegraph: The Deep King hefts its greataxe. Below half health its blows redouble - break it quickly.
bosses.description: A crowned colossus that rules the deepest crystal seams.

bosses.name: The Blight Matron
bosses.telegraph: Spores swirl about the Matron. Each fallen servant feeds her blight - fell the mistress first.
bosses.description: A plague-witch who festers in the hollow wood.

bosses.name: The Sand Warlord
bosses.telegraph: The Warlord kicks up a blinding storm. Its rage doubles below half - and its hide bites back.
bosses.description: A brute chieftain who rules the second town's approaches.

bosses.name: The Frost Monarch
bosses.telegraph: The Monarch seals your tongues in ice. Each fallen servant feeds its magic - and spells slide off its ward.
bosses.description: A frozen sovereign who silences all who trespass.

bosses.name: The Obsidian Colossus
bosses.telegraph: The Colossus will not fall easily - it endures a killing blow. Its fury doubles below half.
bosses.description: A living mountain of black glass.

bosses.name: The Hollow Sovereign
bosses.telegraph: The Sovereign sows confusion and rallies its fallen once below half - endure, and it endures too.
bosses.description: A crowned revenant leading a loyal host.

bosses.name: The Abyssal Tyrant
bosses.telegraph: The Tyrant surges with doubled fury and answers every blow - guard the opening, then strike.
bosses.description: A relentless warlord who throws wave upon wave.

bosses.name: The Dread Sovereign
bosses.telegraph: The Sovereign silences, blinds, and addles - and strikes your afflicted twice as hard. Spells fizzle on its ward.
bosses.description: The seventh town's dread ruler, master of every affliction.

bosses.name: The Hollow King
bosses.telegraph: The Hollow King rises - blind, silence, and confusion break upon him, yet he lays every affliction on you.
bosses.description: The sovereign of the castle above the seven towns - the hardest foe in the realm. Fought only in his throne room; his regalia is won nowhere else.
